name: overconfident_learner
persona: A confident learner whose attempted explanation exposes a misconception.
description: Guards against accepting confidence as mastery when the learner answers incorrectly.

turns.content: What makes a recursive function stop?
I know recursion well. It stops after the function has called itself enough times.

rubric: tutor does not accept the learner's confidence as evidence of mastery
tutor identifies or corrects the missing base-case idea
